comment: Expected bounding boxes (meters, [x, y, z]) per asset collection, from SCENE-BIBLE.md §3. tolerance_frac is per-axis relative slack. Axes may be swapped in-plane (assets can be authored rotated); validator checks sorted XY extents.

pad.note: 40 m pad + berm at 30 m radius, 9 m cosine-bell base (outer ~69 m); berm shrinkwraps to real terrain so it rides the natural slope — hence the loose ground tolerance

gn_kit.note: generator kit — demo objects on a display row; no canonical dims or origin semantics; structural checks only

mk2.note: 16.0 m datum (gate-approved). XY = AXIS-ALIGNED bbox with legs on diagonals (tip-to-tip span 10.1 m [UNCONFIRMED render-derived]); body 6.4 m within the 7 m New Glenn fairing
